mapper.select:
SELECT CASE WHEN PT.PLATFORM = 'Remote Access Only' THEN 'DB' ELSE 'SERVER' END AS TYPE, COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM pi_target_group TG JOIN PI_TARGETS PT ON TG.TARGET_ID = PT.TARGET_ID AND TG.AP_NO = PT.AP_NO WHERE TG.TYPE = 1 AND PT.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pi_target_user TU WHERE TU.TARGET_ID = TG.TARGET_ID AND TU.AP_NO = TG.AP_NO AND TU.USER_NO = #{userNo} )
GROUP BY CASE WHEN PT.PLATFORM = 'Remote Access Only' THEN 'DB' ELSE 'SERVER' END
SELECT idx AS IDX, name AS NAME FROM pi_custom_name WHERE flag = 'server' AND idx IS NOT NULL AND name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY idx
SELECT PATTERN_IDX AS PATTERN_IDX, PATTERN_CODE AS PATTERN_CODE, PATTERN_KR_NAME AS PATTERN_KR_NAME, COLOR_CODE AS COLOR_CODE FROM pi_custom_pattern ORDER BY PATTERN_IDX ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN TG.TYPE = 1 THEN COALESCE( (SELECT PG.NAME FROM pi_target_group PG WHERE PG.IDX = TG.UP_IDX), '-' ) ELSE TG.NAME END AS GROUP_NM, TG.NAME AS SERVER_NM, CASE WHEN PT.PLATFORM = 'Remote Access Only' THEN 'DB' ELSE 'SERVER' END AS PLATFORM, TG.TARGET_ID, TG.AP_NO,
(SELECT U.user_name FROM pi_target_user TU2 JOIN pi_user U ON U.USER_NO = TU2.USER_NO WHERE TU2.TARGET_ID = TG.TARGET_ID AND TU2.AP_NO = TG.AP_NO AND TU2.USERFLAG = CONCAT('server', #{col.IDX}) LIMIT 1) AS `${col.NAME}` , CASE WHEN PT.PLATFORM = 'Remote Access Only' THEN IFNULL(DB24H.total_match_24h, 0) ELSE IFNULL(LATEST_RAW.match_value, 0) END AS PII_CNT, CASE WHEN PT.PLATFORM = 'Remote Access Only' THEN DB24H.data_types_24h ELSE LATEST_RAW.data_types_value END AS DATA_TYPES_JSON FROM pi_target_group TG JOIN pi_targets PT ON TG.TARGET_ID = PT.TARGET_ID AND TG.AP_NO = PT.AP_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT RI.target_id, RI.ap_no, RI.`match` AS match_value, RI.data_types AS data_types_value FROM ( SELECT RI2.target_id, RI2.ap_no, RI2.`match`, RI2.data_types, RI2.report_timestamp, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RI2.target_id, RI2.ap_no ORDER BY RI2.`timestamp` DESC) AS rn FROM pi_rawisolated RI2 JOIN pi_targets T2 ON RI2.target_id = T2.target_id AND RI2.ap_no = T2.ap_no JOIN ( SELECT target_id, ap_no, report_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY target_id, ap_no ORDER BY regdate DESC) AS rn FROM pi_isolated ) LATEST_ISO ON LATEST_ISO.target_id = RI2.target_id AND LATEST_ISO.ap_no = RI2.ap_no AND LATEST_ISO.rn = 1 WHERE RI2.report_timestamp = LATEST_ISO.report_id AND T2.platform != 'Remote Access Only' AND RI2.path = 'All local files' ) RI WHERE RI.rn = 1 ) LATEST_RAW ON LATEST_RAW.target_id = TG.TARGET_ID AND LATEST_RAW.ap_no = TG.AP_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT base.target_id, base.ap_no, IFNULL(SUM(RI.`match`), 0) AS total_match_24h, GROUP_CONCAT(RI.data_types ORDER BY RI.`timestamp` SEPARATOR '|||') AS data_types_24h FROM ( SELECT RI2.target_id, RI2.ap_no, MAX(RI2.`timestamp`) AS latest_ts FROM pi_rawisolated RI2 JOIN pi_targets T2 ON RI2.target_id = T2.target_id AND RI2.ap_no = T2.ap_no WHERE T2.platform = 'Remote Access Only' GROUP BY RI2.target_id, RI2.ap_no ) base JOIN pi_rawisolated RI ON RI.target_id = base.target_id AND RI.ap_no = base.ap_no AND RI.`timestamp` BETWEEN base.latest_ts - 86400 AND base.latest_ts AND RI.data_types IS NOT NULL AND RI.data_types != '' GROUP BY base.target_id, base.ap_no ) DB24H ON DB24H.target_id = TG.TARGET_ID AND DB24H.ap_no = TG.AP_NO WHERE TG.TYPE = 1 AND PT.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pi_target_user TU WHERE TU.TARGET_ID = TG.TARGET_ID AND TU.AP_NO = TG.AP_NO AND TU.USER_NO = #{userNo} )
ORDER BY PII_CNT DESC
